zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Batisford於1364年出生在英國英格蘭素可瓦特林時，她的父親Sir William Batisford of Wartling33歲，母親Lady Margaret de Peplesham29歲。她於大約1381年與William Fiennes II在英國結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。她去世於1406年1月18日在英國英格蘭素可海爾善姆享年42歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭素可賀斯特蒙瑟。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth Batisford于1364年出生在英国英格兰素可瓦特林时，她的父亲Sir William Batisford of Wartling33岁，母亲Lady Margaret de Peplesham29岁。她于大约1381年与William Fiennes II在英国结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。她去世于1406年1月18日在英国英格兰素可海爾善姆享年42岁，埋葬在英国英格兰素可賀斯特蒙瑟。

nameMeanings.name: Batisford
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Batsford (Gloucestershire) or Battisford (Suffolk). The Gloucestershire placename is derived from the Old English personal name Bæcci + genitive -es + ōra ‘slope, shoulder-shaped hill’ (altered in Early Modern English as if from the word ford). The first element of the Suffolk name is the unattested personal name Bætti in the genitive case + ford.

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Batisford was born in 1364, in Wartling, Sussex, England, United Kingdom, her father, Sir William Batisford of Wartling, was 33 and her mother, Lady Margaret de Peplesham, was 29. She married William Fiennes II about 1381, in England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. She died on 18 January 1406, in Hailsham, Sussex, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 42, and was buried in Herstmonceux, Sussex, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth Batisford est née en 1364, à Wartling, Sussex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir William Batisford of Wartling, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Lady Margaret de Peplesham, avait 29 ans. Elle a épousé William Fiennes II environ 1381, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Elle est décédée le 18 janvier 1406, à Hailsham, Sussex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 42 ans, et a été enterrée à Herstmonceux, Sussex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth Batisford 1364 in Wartling, Sussex, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir William Batisford of Wartling 33 und ihre Mutter Lady Margaret de Peplesham 29. Sie hat um 1381 in England William Fiennes II geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Sie starb am 18. Januar 1406 im Alter von 42 Jahren in Hailsham, Sussex, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Herstmonceux, Sussex, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Batisford è nata il nel 1364 nel Wartling, Sussex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Sir William Batisford of Wartling, aveva 33 anni e sua madre, Lady Margaret de Peplesham, aveva 29 anni. Lei sposato William Fiennes II circa 1381, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì il 18 gennaio 1406, nel Hailsham, Sussex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 42 anni, e fu sepolta a Herstmonceux, Sussex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Batisfordが1364年にイギリスイギリススセックスワートリングで生まれた時，父Sir William Batisford of Wartlingは33歳，母Lady Margaret de Pepleshamは29歳であった。約1381年にイギリスでWilliam Fiennes IIと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼女は1406年1月18日にイギリスイギリススセックスヘイルシャムで42歳で死去し，イギリスイギリススセックスハーストモンセウックスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Batisford(이)가 1364년 영국 잉글랜드 수세스 워틀링에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir William Batisford of Wartling(은)는 33세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Margaret de Peplesham(은)는 29세였다. 그녀는 대략 1381년 영국에서 William Fiennes II(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1406년 1월 18일 영국 잉글랜드 수세스 하이샤에서 42세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 수세스 허스트몬스우스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Batisford nasceu em 1364, em Wartling, Sussex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir William Batisford of Wartling, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Lady Margaret de Peplesham, tinha 29 anos. Ela casou-se com William Fiennes II aproximadamente 1381, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ela faleceu em 18 de janeiro de 1406, em Hailsham, Sussex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 42 anos, e foi sepultada em Herstmonceux, Sussex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Batisford родилась в 1364 г. в местности вартлинг, суссекс, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir William Batisford of Wartling было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Lady Margaret de Peplesham, 29. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William Fiennes II около 1381 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Она умерла 18 января 1406 г. в местности хеилшам, суссекс, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 42 лет и была похоронена в местности хирстмонсеукс, суссекс, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elizabeth Batisford nació en 1364, en Wartling, Sussex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir William Batisford of Wartling, tenía 33 años y su mamá, Lady Margaret de Peplesham, tenía 29 años. Se casó con William Fiennes II aproximadamente 1381, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Murió el 18 de enero de 1406, en Hailsham, Sussex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 42 años, y fue sepultada en Herstmonceux, Sussex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
